name: PDF Ingestion Pipeline
desc: marker-pdf GPU extraction + DeepSeek prompt gen + Ollama Qwen2.5-VL figure description. Batch multi-PDF pipeline on a single GPU instance.
onstart: env | grep _ >> /etc/environment; mkdir -p /workspace/input /workspace/staging /workspace/output /workspace/output/logs; echo '=== PIPELINE READY ===' > /workspace/output/READY
